alerts: Orange Alert: High Risk - Schedule a comprehensive clinical evaluation.
Biomarker Alert: Elevated Fasting Glucose indicative of active Diabetes Risk.
Biomarker Alert: Stage 2 Hypertension detected (High Cardiovascular Risk).
recommendations: Reduce dietary intake of refined carbohydrates and simple sugars.
Incorporate daily stress-reduction techniques such as mindfulness, meditation, or yoga.
Schedule a follow-up test to monitor HbA1c levels.
Adopt a heart-healthy diet (e.g., Mediterranean or DASH diet).
Increase daily physical activity to improve HDL and lower LDL.
Improve sleep hygiene to consistently reach 7-8 hours of restful sleep per night.
Enroll in a smoking cessation program immediately; this single action drastically reduces CVD risk.
Incorporate at least 150 minutes of moderate aerobic exercise weekly.
Target a 5-10% weight reduction to significantly lower your combined metabolic risk score.
